name: Rimehorn Glimmer
description: A wooden lamp commonly found indoors in Frostmoon Enclave. Its distinctive appearance is inspired by the Rimehorn Deer.\nAlthough it comes with a carrying handle, its considerable weight means it is usually parked in a fixed location. Most folks in Frostmoon Enclave use it as a night light, as it is bright enough to illuminate without disturbing small friendly animals.
